caption: A gold-colored screen displays a countdown for an upcoming segment. In the top left corner, the text "super science saturday" appears in white, lowercase letters, with a small star-like graphic beside the word "science." The top right corner features a logo for the "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION." Centered in the upper half of the screen, the words "NEXT UP" are written in large, white, uppercase letters. Below this, a grey rectangular box contains the white text "Cooking Up a Storm: Super Science Snack!" At the bottom center of the screen, a digital timer counts down in white numbers. The timer starts at "0:04" and decreases by one second in each subsequent view, progressing to "0:03," then "0:01," and finally reaching "0:00." No people, clothing, or physical equipment are visible in the scene.
